economic_notes: Band operates Key-oh Lodge, Rainbow Gas Bar, Ts'il Kaz Koh Development Corporation, Ts'il Kaz Koh Development Limited Partnership (75% owned). Burns Lake Community Forest generated $1,697,874 in 2022. Summit Camps generated $349,911. Coastal Gas Link payments received. Nations Cannabis Holdings LP investment fully impaired in 2020 ($1,500,000). Turtle Island Land Management Corporation Ltd. is inactive GBE.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on results of operations and cash flows for 2022 due to carry-over of a scope limitation on Rainbow Gas Bar sales completeness from 2021, affecting comparability. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. expenses_enterprises mapped to Economic Development segment. total_government_transfers includes ISC $1,008,314 + CMHC $119,644 + Province of BC $3,382,159 + First Nations Health Authority $113,916 + Carrier Sekani Family Services $86,523 + Ministry of Children and Family Development $441,945 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $31,437 + BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP $164,035 - osr includes taxation $618,172, Key-oh Lodge $1,261,491, Rainbow Gas Bar $146,455, rental income $175,743, Ottawa Trust Fund $50,387, and other income $2,216,459. Nations Cannabis Holdings LP investment of $1,500,000 fully impaired in 2020 and not consolidated.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
